requestedOutcome: Implement docs/aegis/specs/2026-06-30-agentscope-core-boundary-design.md with focused tests on high-risk boundary points.
goal: Make AgentScope a focused execution backend while Seahorse Kernel remains the owner of product governance.
successEvidence: Core-only AgentScope startup registers the executor without optional integration beans.
AgentScope tool execution routes through GovernedToolExecutionPort.
AgentScope adapter has no direct tool policy, approval repository/query, or tool gateway dependency.
A2A inbound requests enter through AgentExternalInvocationInboundPort.
engine=kernel remains the default rollback path and engine=agentscope route smoke passes.
Targeted tests, broader regressions, boundary scans, and release gate pass.
stopCondition: Stop after logical split, governed facade, A2A inbound boundary, compatibility aggregate, and verification evidence are complete; defer physical Maven module split to M4.
nonGoals: Remove A2A, Nacos, Config Center, or Studio
Replace Seahorse governance, memory, RAG, model routing, approval, quota, audit, or billing
Perform physical Maven module split in this slice
scope: AgentScope adapter autoconfiguration, governed tool facade, A2A inbound boundary, Kernel chat command propagation, focused tests, and release-gate evidence
